_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in conducting market and user research.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting data consumer discovery, translating consumer data needs into data product requirements with defined quality, freshness, and access standards.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-S-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-S-006 (DQ, cosine: 0.538), LS-S-005 (LS, cosine: 0.536).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.4/10 (raw 0.542). Shared vocabulary: [conducting, skill]. DCWF-only terms [market, research, user] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, consumer, data, defined, discovery, freshness] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.889 (P=0.923, R=0.858). P exceeds R by 0.065 — the DCWF element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 21 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.3%). "Skill in conducting market and user research." and "Skill in conducting data consumer discovery, translating consumer data needs int" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.575 ≈ STS 0.542 (gap 0.033). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [conducting, skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 19.1%. Shared tokens: [conducting, skill]. DCWF-only: [market, research, user]. WIDAI-only: [access, consumer, data, defined, discovery, freshness].

signals.detail: STS 0.542 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
